title.zh: Claude Code 中文指南：下载、反编译与配置
title.en: Claude Code Chinese Guide: Download, Decompilation and Configuration

description.zh: Claude Code CLI 工具的下载、反编译脚本使用，以及服务检查失败和版本绕过运行等问题的解决方案。
description.en: Guide for downloading and decompiling Claude Code CLI tool, along with solutions for service check failures and version bypass issues.

content.zh: 如何下载和反编译 Claude Code？
content.en: How to download and decompile Claude Code?

annotation.zh: 用户询问 Claude Code 的逆向分析方法
annotation.en: User asks about Claude Code reverse engineering methods

codeBlocks.code:
#!/bin/bash

set -e

# 检查参数
if [ -z "$1" ]; then
    echo "用法: $0 <version>"
    echo "示例: $0 1.0.0"
    exit 1
fi

VERSION="$1"
VERSION_DIR="$VERSION"
DECOMPILED_DIR="decompiled_$VERSION"
PACKAGE_NAME="@anthropic-ai/claude-code"

echo "=========================================="
echo "Claude Code 版本下载与反编译脚本"
echo "版本: $VERSION"
echo "=========================================="

# 清理并创建目录
echo ""
echo "[1/5] 准备目录..."
rm -rf "$VERSION_DIR"
rm -rf "$DECOMPILED_DIR"
mkdir -p "$VERSION_DIR"

# 下载指定版本的包
echo ""
echo "[2/5] 下载 $PACKAGE_NAME@$VERSION ..."
cd "$VERSION_DIR"
npm pack "$PACKAGE_NAME@$VERSION"

# 找到下载的 tgz 文件
TGZ_FILE=$(ls *.tgz | head -n 1)
if [ -z "$TGZ_FILE" ]; then
    echo "错误: 下载失败，未找到 tgz 文件"
    exit 1
fi
echo "已下载: $TGZ_FILE"

# 解压包
echo ""
echo "[3/5] 解压到 $VERSION_DIR 目录..."
tar -xzf "$TGZ_FILE"
mv package/ $VERSION/
# PACKAGE_DIR=$(tar -tzf "$TGZ_FILE" | head -n 1 | cut -f1 -d"/")
# mv "$PACKAGE_DIR"*/* .
# rm -rf "$PACKAGE_DIR"*
rm "$TGZ_FILE"

cd ..

# 检查是否安装了 webcrack
echo ""
echo "[4/5] 检查 webcrack..."
if ! command -v webcrack &> /dev/null; then
    echo "webcrack 未安装，正在安装..."
    npm install -g webcrack
fi

# 反编译代码
echo ""
echo "[5/5] 反编译代码到 $DECOMPILED_DIR ..."
webcrack "$VERSION_DIR/$VERSION_DIR/cli.js" -o "$VERSION_DIR/$DECOMPILED_DIR"

echo ""
echo "=========================================="
echo "完成！"
echo "=========================================="
echo ""
echo "目录结构："
echo "  $VERSION_DIR/       - 原始包（可用 npx 调用）"
echo "  $DECOMPILED_DIR/    - 反编译后的代码"
echo ""
echo "使用方法："
echo "  cd $VERSION_DIR"
echo "  npx .        # 调用该版本的 Claude Code"
echo ""

content.zh: 使用提供的 bash 脚本可以自动化下载和反编译：1) 清理并创建目录；2) 使用 npm pack 下载指定版本；3) 解压包文件；4) 检查并安装 webcrack；5) 反编译代码到输出目录。运行示例：./down2crack.sh 1.0.38
content.en: Use the provided bash script for automated download and decompilation: 1) Clean and create directories; 2) Use npm pack to download specified version; 3) Extract package files; 4) Check and install webcrack; 5) Decompile code to output directory. Run example: ./down2crack.sh 1.0.38

content.zh: 遇到服务检查失败怎么办？
content.en: What to do about service check failure?

content.zh: 服务检查失败提示：无法连接到 Anthropic 服务。解决方案：修改 .claude.json 文件，添加 hasCompletedOnboarding: true 字段到配置中，绕过服务检查限制。
content.en: Service check failure message: Unable to connect to Anthropic services. Solution: Modify .claude.json file, add hasCompletedOnboarding: true field to configuration to bypass service check restrictions.

content.zh: 如何绕过版本更新提示？
content.en: How to bypass version update prompts?

content.zh: 低版本绕过运行方法：修改 cli.js 文件第 2115 行，将 `,sI(1)}catch(A)` 改为 `}catch(A)`，移除版本检查逻辑，允许低版本继续运行。
content.en: Low version bypass method: Modify line 2115 in cli.js file, change `,sI(1)}catch(A)` to `}catch(A)`, remove version check logic to allow older versions to continue running.
